summary: Heavily focused on a crypto trading platform and its surrounding ecosystem, alongside significant work on embedded input/firmware projects, Android tools, and AI/ML research.

items.title: Crypto trading platform infrastructure
items.description: Continued polishing the SaaS crypto trading platform, focusing on Docker builds and service-account authentication.

items.title: Minimal key remapper project
items.description: Started building a minimal alternative to AutoHotKey with scenario engine and interception support.

items.title: Firmware for emulation hardware
items.description: Worked on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3 devices.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a Windows kernel-level input filter and injection driver.

items.title: Personal CV and input project
items.description: Iterated on a personal project for screen capture, overlay, and input emulation with computer vision.

items.title: Android text-to-speech tooling
items.description: Built an Android TTS implementation supporting multiple engine models and voice customizations.

items.title: Crypto trading platform features
items.description: Built out major features for the SaaS crypto trading platform, including proxy infrastructure, billing, and UI improvements.

items.title: File tagging utility for Windows
items.description: Maintained a Windows Explorer file and folder tagging utility, addressing metadata and encoding issues.

items.title: E-ink reader firmware customization
items.description: Developed custom firmware for an e-ink device, adding mapping and knowledge base applications.

items.title: Proxy tooling maintenance
items.description: Updated a proxy client with new transport support and exposed APIs.

items.title: Crypto prediction model research
items.description: Experimented with deep learning architectures for crypto price prediction.

items.title: On-device AI assistant for Android
items.description: Iterated on an Android LLM assistant with on-device capabilities and sub-agent delegation.

items.title: Android e-ink launcher app
items.description: Built a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink readers.

items.title: File tagging utility CI management
items.description: Worked on CI/CD pipelines and Microsoft Store publishing for the Windows file tagging utility.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a graph-powered code intelligence engine and MCP server for AI agents.

items.title: Telegram automation for n8n
items.description: Maintained and fixed a Telegram node module for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Personal development environment
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim and dotfiles setup for development.

items.title: Poker computer vision analysis
items.description: Built a computer vision pipeline for parsing and reconstructing online poker hand histories.

items.title: Claude agent n8n integration
items.description: Worked on an n8n node module integrating the Claude Agent SDK.

items.title: Multi-bot Telegram automation
items.description: Developed a Telegram multi-bot management system with a web application.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with worktree management.

items.title: Android on-device TTS evolution
items.description: Started developing a feature-rich Android TTS application with custom engines and intonation control.

items.title: Firmware development for peripherals
items.description: Engineered feature-rich firmware versions for ESP32-based mouse and keyboard emulation.

items.title: Crypto trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies for Freqtrade.

items.title: Telegram content automation
items.description: Built automation tooling for Telegram content management and forwarding.
